executionArgs.additionalInstruction: App is mock-only (IS_MOCK defaults to true) — never expect real network calls to localhost:8000. UI is in Spanish neutro (tuteo) — match Spanish copy. Onboarding tour persists in localStorage key bbva-talent:onboarding-seen-v1; clear it before tests that need a fresh tour. Networking view persists in sessionStorage key bbva-talent:last-view; clear it for clean state. Theme persists in localStorage. Heavy components are dynamic with ssr:false — wait for client hydration. Canonical demo: SDA-53021 FX Tracker. Canonical employee: emp_001 Valentina Rios.
